title: Walter Guidroz
compiled_truth: Walter Guidroz is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-10-03 to 2001-06-08), Walter Guidroz sent 65 and received 289 emails, totalling 354 interactions. Top correspondents: [Tana Jones](people/tana-jones) (58), [Tom Moran](people/tom-moran) (50), [Tanya Rohauer](people/tanya-rohauer) (43), [Karen Lambert](people/karen-lambert) (42), [Samuel Schott](people/samuel-schott) (41).
